notes: Everything works including settings and controller config.
title: FINAL FANTASY® XI: Ultimate Collection Seekers Edition

notes: The only thing I needed to do was turn off Steam Overlay for the game, otherwise PlayOnline would crash during its startup syncing.  As for the controller all I needed to do was to select Alternate Gamepad Config (E) in FFXI Config Gamepad Settings.
title: FINAL FANTASY® XI: Ultimate Collection Seekers Edition

notes: I didn't need to do anything that I wouldn't have had to do in Windows 7 (and in fact its somewhat easier since you don't deal with UAC). Configured controller just fine. Graphics are fine, FPS, fine...
title: FINAL FANTASY® XI: Ultimate Collection Seekers Edition

notes: Still runs great. Recent changes in 4.11-3 (vs -2) pretty much require you use Steam's controller emulation if want to use a PS4 controller. I don't consider this a real work around, partially because I was already doing that for other reasons, and because its a normal part of the Steam Client. Some might feel this would make it Gold, but I don't think so.
title: FINAL FANTASY® XI: Ultimate Collection Seekers Edition
